positiveClaims: The existing release claim attestation gate is product-bound as a bounded Review Bridge 12E attestation boundary.
Accepted 12E requires accepted 12D release claim mode decision provenance and re-evaluates raw 12D decision input before accepting.
Accepted 12E requires the supplied 12D result to match the recomputed accepted 12D result.
Accepted 12E requires attestationId, attestationSchema, inputHash, outputHash, commandRunDigest, decisionHash, and evidenceHash.
Accepted 12E requires decisionHash to match the normalized accepted 12D result.
Accepted 12E requires commandRunDigest to match normalized executedCommands.
Accepted 12E requires evidenceHash to match normalized artifactHashes.
RELEASE_MODE 12E requires non-empty executedCommands, artifactHashes, releaseEvidenceId, and releaseEvidenceHash.
RELEASE_MODE 12E now requires releaseEvidenceId and releaseEvidenceHash to match accepted 12D release evidence.
The immediate downstream 12F packet emit guard now requires 12E decisionHash to match the top-level accepted 12D result, blocking mixed accepted 12D and 12E pairs.

This contour is attestation binding truth only; it is not packet emit completion, release execution, release publication, user-facing release, import, export, apply, storage truth, or release readiness truth.
nonClaims: No release readiness is claimed.
No user-facing release is claimed.
No packet emit completion is claimed.
No release execution completion is claimed.
No release publication completion is claimed.
No release-wide attestation authority beyond bounded 12E gate binding is claimed.
No Word support is claimed.
No Google Docs support is claimed.
No DOCX support expansion is claimed.
No import support is claimed.
No export support is claimed.
No review import completion is claimed.
No roundtrip is claimed.
No layout parity is claimed.
No full fidelity is claimed.
No automatic apply is claimed.
No structural apply is claimed.
No comment auto-apply is claimed.
No manuscript write is performed by release claim attestation binding.
No project truth write is performed by release claim attestation binding.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by release claim attestation binding.
No DOCX import safe-create behavior is changed.
No DOCX export behavior is changed.
No import/export MVP closeout is widened.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, cloud sync, cross-platform readiness, packaged readiness, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: Attestation binding is release-claim attestation truth only and accepts only bounded internal release-claim candidate evidence.
Attestation gate acceptance does not become project truth by itself.
Attestation gate acceptance does not create a release packet by itself.
Attestation gate acceptance does not admit execution or publication.
Attestation gate acceptance does not prove full fidelity, layout parity, roundtrip, import correctness, or export correctness.
This contour is not a packet emit completion contour.
This contour is not a user-facing boundary contour.
This contour is not a release execution contour.
This contour is not a release publication contour.
Attestation binding is not a parser and does not inspect external documents.
Attestation binding is not content import and does not create scenes.
Attestation binding is not Review import automation and does not activate a Review session.
Attestation binding is not an apply plan and does not authorize mutation.
Attestation binding is not safe write and does not create receipt or recovery evidence.
Attestation binding is not export and does not alter DOCX output.
Review Bridge may reference accepted 12E output as bounded internal chain evidence, but accepted 12E output does not become project truth.

machineChecks.command: node --test release claim mode decision, attestation, and packet emit baseline contracts
node --test release claim attestation and packet emit hardened contracts
node --test release claim attestation binding plus adjacent 12E and 12F contracts
node --test release claim full contract pack

agentAudits.finding: Confirmed 12D is the last delivered contour, 12E is the next bounded Review Bridge boundary, and the status/docs must not claim release readiness, packet emit completion, execution, publication, import/export support, apply, receipt, recovery, storage truth, or Y9.

Identified a false-green risk where 12F could accept top-level accepted 12D plus accepted 12E built from a different accepted 12D when mode, claimId, dossierId, and matrixId matched; resolved by binding 12F to exact 12E decisionHash and binding RELEASE_MODE 12E release evidence to accepted 12D release evidence.

nextStep: after delivery, continue with the next owner-selected Review Bridge boundary; the logical next boundary is CONTOUR_12F_RELEASE_CLAIM_PACKET_EMIT
